# Redbird Lawn Service

> Residential lawn care services in Wentzville, MO. Owned and operated by Alberto Murillo.

Redbird Lawn Service is a fully insured, locally owned residential lawn care company serving Wentzville, O'Fallon, Lake Saint Louis, Troy, and Foristell in St. Charles County, Missouri. The company provides weekly mowing, trimming and edging, mulch and bed maintenance, and seasonal cleanups for homeowners.

## Contact

- Phone: (314) 497-6152
- Email: sales@redbirdlawnservice.com
- Website: https://redbirdlawnservice.com
- Service area: Wentzville, MO 63385 and surrounding cities

## Services

- Weekly Mowing: Professional mowing at optimal height for grass type, edging along driveways, walkways, and beds, clipping cleanup
- Trimming and Edging: String trimming around obstacles, rotary edging along all hard surfaces, clean debris removal
- Mulch and Bed Maintenance: Weed pulling, bed re-edging, fresh mulch installation at 2 to 3 inch depth, shrub trimming
- Seasonal Cleanups: Spring and fall leaf removal, dethatching, aeration, final mow, gutter blowout, debris haul-away

## Key Facts

- No contracts required
- Free estimates with no obligation
- All equipment provided
- Fully insured
- 5-star rated on Google
- Owner lives in Wentzville

## Blog

The Redbird blog publishes practical lawn care advice written by Alberto Murillo for Missouri homeowners. Topics include mowing frequency, mowing height, blade sharpness, edging technique, watering strategy, and new sod care.

- [How Often Should You Mow Your Lawn in Wentzville, MO?](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/how-often-mow-lawn-wentzville-mo)
- [Lawn Health 101: What Every Wentzville Homeowner Should Know](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/lawn-health-101-wentzville-homeowner)
- [Why Sharp Mower Blades Matter More Than You Think](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/why-sharp-mower-blades-matter)
- [Why We Alternate Our Mowing Pattern Every Week](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/why-we-alternate-mowing-pattern)
- [What's the Right Mowing Height for Missouri Lawns?](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/right-mowing-height-missouri-lawns)
- [Why You Should Never Mow Wet Grass](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/why-you-should-never-mow-wet-grass)
- [The Art of a Clean Edge: Why Edging Makes Your Lawn Look Professional](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/art-of-clean-edge-why-edging-matters)
- [First Time Mowing New Sod? Here's What Alberto Does](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/first-time-mowing-new-sod-what-alberto-does)
- [How to Water Your Lawn the Right Way in Missouri](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/how-to-water-lawn-right-way-missouri)
